query: SELECT ss.orderId, ss.sceneIndex, ss.status, LEFT(ss.illustrationUrl, 150) as illUrl, LEFT(ss.narrationUrl, 100) as narUrl FROM storyScenes ss WHERE ss.orderId IN (510001, 480001, 450001) ORDER BY ss.orderId, ss.sceneIndex LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2ngM8wFkA348DwV.d038836586ef --database LzCHneSJWfHsfEKists2Bj --execute SELECT ss.orderId, ss.sceneIndex, ss.status, LEFT(ss.illustrationUrl, 150) as illUrl, LEFT(ss.narrationUrl, 100) as narUrl FROM storyScenes ss WHERE ss.orderId IN (510001, 480001, 450001) ORDER BY ss.orderId, ss.sceneIndex LIMIT 20;
